title: cupressus gigantea subsp. tongmaiensis
intro: Cupressus gigantea subsp. tongmaiensis, also known as Tongmai Cypress, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cupressaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Tongmai Cypress is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
